title: It's All Yours
writer: Adelaide Heilbron, Mary C. McCall Jr.
actors: Madeleine Carroll, Francis Lederer, Mischa Auer
plot: Jimmy Barnes arrives from Europe to be educated by his multi-millionaire uncle, Edward J. Barnes and in five years the extravagant escapes of Jimmy, now a lawyer, are the talk of San Francisco. Linda Gray is a mouse-like secretary...
